title: Compliance: KISS TX queue (rust/lichen-kiss/src/framing.rs)
description: Policy: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md sections 1,2,4,5. Current: bounded (8 frames), returns error. Missing: time-based expiry (§2), priority (§3). Fix: add timestamp, drop expired frames.
close_reason: Verified compliant: KissWriter TX queue is bounded at compile time using heapless::Deque<heapless::Vec<u8, 512>, 8> - max 8 frames of 512 bytes each (~4KB total). Returns KissError::BufferTooSmall when full.
